title: Buttery Silk Pasta Stir-fry
description: A quick and satisfying weeknight dish featuring silky pasta tossed with buttery sauce, parsley, and a touch of broiling for added texture.

ingredients.name: Ground Saffron or Red Pepper Flakes

instructions: Preheat broiler and prepare a baking dish. Rinse and pat dry the pasta.
Combine pasta, scallions, and some olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add soy sauce and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not burnt.
Stir in butter until fully melted and smooth. Cook briefly to coat pasta evenly with sauce.
Top with chopped parsley and any remaining scallion slices, then broil until parsley starts to crisp slightly (about 1-2 minutes).
